TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-weaving_abas_ipay3

S.FORM: azi e anu yau dawadsu si sanis e pibuRika peninaku si sanisika haw.
S.TRANSL: 阿姐，如果你有時間的話，削 ... 砍我的香蕉樹，削樹皮。
Sister, if you have time, bark ... cut my banana trees and bark (them).

S.FORM: nengi ti kinawsa pa ita ya mana qaya.
S.TRANSL: 可以啊，我們兩個一起做。
Okay, we two can do it together.

S.FORM: a kwa ya nani wanay ka.
S.TRANSL: 好啊，可是(我有客人)。
Okay, but (I have guests).

S.FORM: ngid iku tenun nani wanay mRayngu iku smanis buqaRas iku.
S.TRANSL: 我想織布，可是我不會削樹皮，我很懶惰。
I want to weave, but I cannot bark (banana trees). I am lazy.

S.FORM: niyana qabuqaRasan qanasanta si qawman mulpun tu usiq peninaan.
S.TRANSL: 不要懶惰，我們慢慢做，一定會做完一根香蕉。
Don’t be lazy. If we do it slowly, we can definitely finish (barking) one banana.

S.FORM: mRayngu iku usiq peninaan nani.
S.TRANSL: 我不能做完一根香蕉。
I cannot (finish barking) one banana.

S.FORM: saqabian iku tu usiq penina nani.
S.TRANSL: 我一天做一根香蕉。
I bark one banana tree in one day.

S.FORM: buqaRas ti iku ya kelawkaway.
S.TRANSL: 我懶的做。
I am too lazy to work.

S.FORM: qanasanta nani qawman mulpun.
S.TRANSL: 慢慢做一定會做完。
We do it slowly, (and we can) definitely finish the job.

S.FORM: azu yau azu tantanuzanna mlalazuk.
S.TRANSL: 好像有人在趕你要快點。
It’s like there is someone who is chasing and hurrying you.

S.FORM: nayau saizi nani wanay smanis iku nani matepuq a limaku na mliza ti iku qaya ya.
S.TRANSL: 我割香蕉，割到我的手，我不敢做了。
(When) I barked banana trees, my hand was cut. I don’t dare to (bark) again.

S.FORM: paqanasaypa mlalalazuk saiza snayauan matepuq a lima.
S.TRANSL: 慢慢做，快的話會割的手。
Do it slowly. If (we) do it in a hurry, (our) hands will be cut.

S.FORM: mlalazuk ita saizi mdungu ti ita nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們要趕快。我們太慢了。
We had to hurry up. We were too slow.

S.FORM: qalalazuk pa ita zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想我們要快一點。
‘We have to hurry up,’ I thought.

S.FORM: timangu matepuq ti limaku na mliza ti iku qaya sanis.
S.TRANSL: 結果我的手被割到了。再也不敢削樹皮了。
It turned out that my hand was cut. I didn’t dare to bark banana trees again.

S.FORM: sukaw mliza.
S.TRANSL: 不要說不敢。
Don’t flinch.

S.FORM: nani pawRatanta nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們一定要做。
We must manage to do it.

S.FORM: sanisika aisu zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我跟你說要削樹皮。
‘Bark the banana trees,’ I said to you.

S.FORM: ngid iku tenun nani mRayngu iku smanis sinananam zin na anemku a.
S.TRANSL: 我想要織布，可是我想我不能削樹皮。
‘I want to weave, but I cannot bark banana trees,’ I think.

S.FORM: qumni qaspeRanna.
S.TRANSL: 你這樣什麼時候才會做?
When will you be able to do it?

S.FORM: nani mRayngu iku zinsu qumni qaspeRansu.
S.TRANSL: 你說不會，那到底什麼時候才會?
You say you are unable to do it. When will you be able to do it?

S.FORM: nayau mRayngu iku zinku na buqaRas ti iku ya.
S.TRANSL: 我想我不行。我很懶惰。
I think I can’t. I am lazy.

S.FORM: si iza smanis nani sukaw buqaRas nayau ti ya wawayku.
S.TRANSL: 削樹皮的時候，我的動作就是這樣子。
(When it comes to) barking banana trees, I am like that.

S.FORM: pawRatanta nani qawman wiya ti sepaR.
S.TRANSL: 懶惰不好，我們一定要勉強做，慢慢就會了。
Being lazy is not good. We must manage to do it, and we’ll be skilled gradually.

S.FORM: en nayau ti saizi anu amawaR si.
S.TRANSL: 好啊，以後。
Okay, afterwards

S.FORM: yau dawad si pawRataka smanis si.
S.TRANSL: 有時間的話，勉強去削樹皮。
If I have time, I will manage to bark banana trees.

S.FORM: saqapian na usiq penina si quni zin na anemku qaya ya.
S.TRANSL: 我想，一天做一根也可以啊。
Barking one banana tree in one day is acceptable, I think.

S.FORM: en nayauanta saqawqa yau sepaR.
S.TRANSL: 我們這樣子，一定會的。
If we do so, we will definitely become skilled.

S.FORM: Rayngu iku Rayngu iku zinta zinsu haw Rayngu ti waliw isu buqaRas.
S.TRANSL: 你一直說不會，結果就真的不會，而且也懶的做。
If you keep saying ‘I can’t, I can’t,’ you will be incapable and lazy.

S.FORM: mlizaq iku tmenun.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡編織。
I like weaving.

S.FORM: wi wi sepapaR.
S.TRANSL: 一直做，就一定會做。
If we keep doing, we will be skilled.

S.FORM: nunuanta nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們每天做。
We do it every day.

S.FORM: wiya ti sepaR nani.
S.TRANSL: 就會做。
(We) will be skilled.

S.FORM: mai ti maytis tu qatepuqan.
S.TRANSL: 就不會怕被割到。
(We) won’t be afraid of being cut.

S.FORM: ngid iku tenun nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想要編織。
I want to weave.

S.FORM: mai tu senanisan nani mlikeneng ti iku a nayau a wawayku buqaRas ay.
S.TRANSL: (可是)沒有割好的香蕉樹皮，我就休息，我就是這樣懶惰的人。
(But) I don’t have the peeled banana bark, (so) I take a rest. I am this kind of lazy person.

S.FORM: malmes iku smanis nani Rayngu iku tmnun.
S.TRANSL: 我認真割香蕉樹皮，(可是)我不會織布。
I am earnest in barking banana trees, (but) I cannot weave.

S.FORM: buqaw pasyani smani.
S.TRANSL: 看不清楚，線往哪裡我不知道。
I have poor eyesight. I don’t know where the lines go.

S.FORM: mlizaq iku tmnun nani.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡編織。
I like weaving.

S.FORM: mai tu senanisan tu qelizen nani mlikeneng ti iku zinku a.
S.TRANSL: (可是)我沒有削好的香蕉樹皮和香蕉樹皮繞成的線圈，我想我就會休息。
(But) I don’t have peeled banana bark and the coil of banana bark, so I will take a rest, I think.

S.FORM: Raynug iku tmnun buqaw.
S.TRANSL: 我不會織布，(因為)看不清楚。
I cannot weave, (because) I have poor eyesight.

S.FORM: pasiyasiyani ti mngiwit.
S.TRANSL: (線)會歪一邊。
(The lines) would be lopsided.

S.FORM: mulpun mulpun ti.
S.TRANSL: 做完了沒有?
Have you finished?

S.FORM: mul mai pama mulpun dadusa pama nazau pama.
S.TRANSL: 還沒有，才完成一半，這麼長而已。
Not yet. I have finished only half of it. This long.

S.FORM: en azasanku temawaR ta taqsian nani.
S.TRANSL: 我明天要帶去學校。
I will take it to school tomorrow.

S.FORM: unay nitenun siRab.
S.TRANSL: 這是你昨天做布的嗎?
Is this what you had for weaving yesterday?

S.FORM: en.
S.TRANSL: 嗯。
Yes.

S.FORM: Ray nani bula iku tata zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我說，給我那個。
‘Give that to me,’ said I.

S.FORM: anu mlalibed paqsidap midayan qaya.
S.TRANSL: 隨便啦。
It doesn’t matter.

S.FORM: anu yau ti ya nitenun na tinaku anu zinna ti na sunis.
S.TRANSL: 小孩說，我媽媽織布的做完了。
The child said, ‘My mother has finished what is for weaving.’

S.FORM: sanisakita zasu ay si.
S.TRANSL: 我們要割你的。
We’ll bark yours.

S.FORM: wanay buqaRas iku.
S.TRANSL: 我很懶惰。
I am lazy.

S.FORM: nutuzika ti tenunika qawqa ita sepaR.
S.TRANSL: 能夠自己繞香蕉線圈和編織，比較好。
If we can coil the lines peeled off from banana bark and weave on our own, it would be better.

S.FORM: mduday tengeng ti unay sukaw midayan sasubuqanta ti.
S.TRANSL: 沒有對齊，又黑，不好，自己用來當背包就好。
subuq就是用從香蕉樹皮割下的線所做成的背袋

S.FORM: midayan zinku ya.
S.TRANSL: 隨便(可以給人家)沒關係。
‘It doesn’t matter,’ said I.

S.FORM: sukaw qangi ma tasu ay qawqa.
S.TRANSL: 不行，我們做新的才可以。
No, we had better make a new one.

S.FORM: mai tu dawad kyami ngid sanis.
S.TRANSL: 沒有時間削香蕉樹皮。
We don’t have time to bark banana trees.

S.FORM: saqutuan a uzusa peninaan qasemin ti mai qayau ti.
S.TRANSL: 半天弄兩個，就夠了，不就有了嗎?
(We) bark two banana trees within half of a day. (We’ll have) enough, won’t we?

S.FORM: anu temawaR si yau ti qatiwka ti sinananamka ti mimali zinna iku na sunjowta nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們的村長說要去練習打球。
Our village head said we were going to practice playing the ball.

S.FORM: mana mai smanu ka panchangta zinku ya.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼我們的班長都沒說?
Why didn’t our class leader tell us?

S.FORM: taqaanna ti ita baibudan sunis ti tangi.
S.TRANSL: 他不要我們老人家，現在都要年輕人。
He doesn’t want us elders. (He needs) youngsters now.

S.FORM: yau yau su izaanna sudadanna nanganna na nanganku nani.
S.TRANSL: 他(班長)有寫他的名字…我的名字。
He (class leader) wrote down his name .. my name.

S.FORM: wanay mai wanay qayau a labangku yu zinku ti asin nani.
S.TRANSL: 我跟Asin講那天我有客人。
I told Asin I had guests (on that day).

S.FORM: anu yau labang tiana ti siliway timaisu zinna iku.
S.TRANSL: 他跟我講說，你有客人的話，誰要代替你做?
‘If you have guests, who will replace you?’ he told me.

S.FORM: mai ti zaku ay.
S.TRANSL: 沒有我的(名字)。
There is no mine (my name).

S.FORM: mai ti tu dawad ka zinku ti ya.
S.TRANSL: 我講說我沒有時間。
‘I don’t have time,’ said I.

S.FORM: anu mai ti zaku ay.
S.TRANSL: 可能沒有我的(名字)。
There is no mine (my name).

S.FORM: mai ti mai ti nangan aisu.
S.TRANSL: 沒有你的名字。
There is no yours.

S.FORM: wama tiayayun na tizin ay nani aiku kintulu imi ya.
S.TRANSL: 只有Ayayun，Zin和我，我們三個人。
Only Ayayun, Zin, and I. We three.

S.FORM: Ru Runanay?.
S.TRANSL: 有男的嗎?
Is there any man?

S.FORM: ita kinani smani Runanay Raynguanku.
S.TRANSL: 男生有幾個我也不知道。
I don’t know how many men there are.

S.FORM: ka samawmang ka kinRabtin lazatan.
S.TRANSL: 只有十個人，我不能去。
Only ten people (can go). (I can’t go).

S.FORM: en Rabtin.
S.TRANSL: 對，只有十個人。
Yes, only ten.

S.FORM: yau utulu ya mlalu’ung zinna si.
S.TRANSL: 東興村有三個人。
There are three people from Dongxing Village.

S.FORM: nayau ti mlalu’ung ala pa ti tu mlalu’ung haw.
S.TRANSL: 要用東興村的人(去參加球賽)。
(They) want residents from Dongxing Village.
